is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of P. falciparum uncomplicated malaria in children, analyzing pfcrt K76T and pfmdr1 N86Y SNPs.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports pfcrt codon 76 (K76T) and pfmdr1 codon 86 (N86Y), both curated target markers.

reports_extractable_frequencies.evidence: Table 1 gives counts (140/29/20 of 189) and frequencies; pfcrt 76T 185/190 (0.974); pfmdr1 86Y 160/209 (0.766).

sub_country_location.evidence: Samples from Kivunge (Unguja Island) and Micheweni (Pemba Island), Zanzibar — named sub-national sites.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Collected between October 2002 and February 2003, a window well under 3 years.

african_field_samples.evidence: Field/clinical isolates from children with uncomplicated malaria in Zanzibar, Tanzania.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary in vivo artemether-lumefantrine follow-up clinical trial with molecular analysis.

duplicate_risk.evidence: Part of Zanzibar Malaria Control Program clinical trial; routine field collection, no explicit statement of dataset overlap with a larger published dataset.

supplement.evidence: All frequency data present in main text and Tables 1-2.

assessment.summary: In vivo artemether-lumefantrine trial in 200 children in Kivunge (Unguja) and Micheweni (Pemba), Zanzibar, Oct 2002-Feb 2003. Reports extractable pfcrt K76T and pfmdr1 N86Y allele frequencies before and after treatment. Meets all criteria: P. falciparum, target markers with counts, sub-national sites, <3y window, African field samples, primary study.
